title: Senior Investment Banker at South Indian Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at South Indian Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
